verses.1: The plans of the heart belong to a person, But the answer of the tongue is from the LORD.
verses.2: All the ways of a person are clean in his own sight, But the LORD examines the motives.
verses.3: Commit your works to the LORD, And your plans will be established.
verses.4: The LORD has made everything for its own purpose, Even the wicked for the day of evil.
verses.5: Everyone who is proud in heart is an abomination to the LORD; Be assured, he will not go unpunished.
verses.6: By mercy and truth atonement is made for wrongdoing, And by the fear of the LORD one keeps away from evil.
verses.7: When a person’s ways are pleasing to the LORD, He causes even his enemies to make peace with him.
verses.8: Better is a little with righteousness Than great income with injustice.
verses.9: The mind of a person plans his way, But the LORD directs his steps.
verses.10: A divine verdict is on the lips of the king; His mouth should not err in judgment.
verses.11: A just balance and scales belong to the LORD; All the weights of the bag are His concern.
verses.12: It is an abomination for kings to commit wicked acts, Because a throne is established on righteousness.
verses.13: Righteous lips are the delight of kings, And one who speaks right is loved.
verses.14: The fury of a king is like messengers of death; But a wise person will appease it.
verses.15: In the light of a king’s face is life, And his favor is like a cloud with the spring rain.
verses.16: How much better it is to get wisdom than gold! And to get understanding is to be chosen above silver.
verses.17: The highway of the upright is to turn away from evil; One who watches his way protects his life.
verses.18: Pride goes before destruction, And a haughty spirit before stumbling.
verses.19: It is better to be humble in spirit with the needy Than to divide the spoils with the proud.
verses.20: One who pays attention to the word will find good, And blessed is one who trusts in the LORD.
verses.21: The wise in heart will be called understanding, And sweetness of speech increases persuasiveness.
verses.22: Understanding is a fountain of life to those who have it, But the discipline of fools is foolishness.
verses.23: The heart of the wise instructs his mouth And adds persuasiveness to his lips.
verses.24: Pleasant words are a honeycomb, Sweet to the soul and healing to the bones.
verses.25: There is a way which seems right to a person, But its end is the way of death.
verses.26: A worker’s appetite works for him, For his hunger urges him on.
verses.27: A worthless person digs up evil, While his words are like scorching fire.
verses.28: A perverse person spreads strife, And a slanderer separates close friends.
verses.29: A person of violence entices his neighbor And leads him in a way that is not good.
verses.30: He who winks his eyes does so to devise perverse things; He who compresses his lips brings evil to pass.
verses.31: A gray head is a crown of glory; It is found in the way of righteousness.
verses.32: One who is slow to anger is better than the mighty, And one who rules his spirit, than one who captures a city.
verses.33: The lot is cast into the lap, But its every decision is from the LORD.
